label: 3D Scene (React Three Fiber)
description: Hand-curated dossier for adding hovering / floating / interactive 3D objects to any Next.js page using React Three Fiber + drei.
summary: Use this whenever the prompt asks for a 3D object, animated mesh, hovering / floating element, product visualisation, hero scene with depth, or any WebGL canvas rendered in React. Provides the verified peer-dependency combination for React Three Fiber v9 + drei v10 + three v0.170 (incompatible combos crash at build/runtime), a Client Component <Canvas> wrapper, an animated mesh example using useFrame, and a strict self-containment rule: every imported mesh component must also be generated. Lazy-loadable, prefers-reduced-motion-aware, mobile-fallback ready.
